scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:debug: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npx cap run android --target=emulator
scripts.build:apk:debug: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build:apk:release: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
